case_title: CARDOZA, THEODORA vs. MOLINARI, LISA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARDOZA, THEODORA AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINARI, LISA WINFIELD, LONNIE DOES 1 TO 60 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-18-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-28-1994
